claims.subject: tap-loyalty reconciliation bug
claims.evidence: when a brazilian merchant has both tap and loyalty enabled the reconciliation report shows wrong totals — the loyalty discount line and the tap settlement line don't reconcile correctly so the daily total the merchant sees doesn't match what they actually got paid
claims.object_value: loyalty discount line and tap settlement line don't reconcile correctly, causing daily total shown to merchant to not match actual payout

claims.subject: tap-loyalty reconciliation bug

claims.object_value: fix scoped but queued behind confluence-blocking work for the loyalty service

claims.subject: tap-loyalty reconciliation bug

claims.subject: tap-loyalty reconciliation bug
claims.evidence: when we looked at q1 prioritization we had a choice between unblocking the schema migration and fixing this bug and we picked the schema migration
claims.object_value: schema migration for Confluence prioritized over bug fix in Q1

claims.subject: quarterly planning cycle
claims.evidence: the part that's broken is that almost everything we want to do has eng cost that's blocked behind confluence so the sort doesn't do as much work as it should
claims.object_value: most items share the same Confluence blocker, making the scoring framework ineffective
